content.content:
{"body":"There is an error in this term name: the SIN (Septation Initiation Network) from S. pombe does not correspond to the FAR/STRIPAK complex, it should be the SIP (SIN Inhibitory Phosphatase) (https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11653735/).

So the term should be called "FAR/SIP/STRIPAK complex".","comments":[{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws8AAAABGslITQ","author":{"login":"raymond91125"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"@dragon-ai-agent please revise the term label for GO:0090443 to FAR/SIP/STRIPAK complex.","createdAt":"2026-06-18T17:08:35Z","includesCreatedEdit":false,"isMinimized":false,"minimizedReason":"","reactionGroups":[{"content":"EYES","users":{"totalCount":1}}],"url":"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/32223#issuecomment-4744366157","viewerDidAuthor":false},{"id":"IC_kwDOAkAHws8AAAABGslYiQ","author":{"login":"dragon-ai-agent"},"authorAssociation":"MEMBER","body":"🤖 Working on it...

content.content:
[Term]
id: GO:0090443
name: FAR/SIN/STRIPAK complex
namespace: cellular_component
def: "A conserved protein phosphatase type 2A complex which contains a protein phosphatase type 2A, a protein phosphatase regulatory subunit, a striatin, an FHA domain protein and other subunits (at least six proteins). In fission yeast this complex negatively regulate the septation initiation network at the spindle pole body." [GOC:vw, PMID:21561862, PMID:22119525]
synonym: "FAR complex" RELATED [GOC:vw]
synonym: "SIN inhibitory phosphatase (SIP) complex" EXACT []
synonym: "SIN inhibitory phosphatase complex" EXACT []
synonym: "SIP complex" EXACT [PMID:22119525]
synonym: "striatin interacting phosphatase and kinase complex" EXACT [GOC:vw]
synonym: "STRIPAK signalling complex" RELATED [GOC:vw]
is_a: GO:0032991 ! protein-containing complex
created_by: tb
creation_date: 2012-08-23T14:20:39Z

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Rename GO:0090443 to FAR/SIP/STRIPAK complex (#32223)" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
Closes #32223.

## Summary

Renames `GO:0090443` from `FAR/SIN/STRIPAK complex` to `FAR/SIP/STRIPAK complex`.

As @raymond91125 noted on the issue, the "SIN" expansion (Septation Initiation Network) is incorrect for this complex — the correct expansion in this context is **SIP** (SIN Inhibitory Phosphatase). The existing `SIN inhibitory phosphatase (SIP) complex` / `SIP complex` synonyms on the term already pointed to this. Reference: https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11653735/.

## Changes to `GO:0090443`

- `name`: `FAR/SIN/STRIPAK complex` -> `FAR/SIP/STRIPAK complex`
- Added `FAR/SIN/STRIPAK complex` as a RELATED synonym (the term has carried this label since 2012, so retaining it as a synonym preserves discoverability)
- Added `property_value: term_tracker_item` pointing to #32223

No structural/axiomatic changes — definition, `is_a`, and other synonyms are unchanged.

## Checklist

- [x] PLAN
- [x] PRE-VALIDATION — `robot convert` parses cleanly prior to edits
- [x] RESEARCH — N/A, fact-of-the-matter rename backed by PMC11653735 in the issue
- [x] TERM-SEARCH — confirmed `GO:0090443` is the only affected stanza
- [x] DESIGN-PATTERNS — N/A, label-only correction
- [x] EDITS — used `obo-checkout.pl` / `obo-checkin.pl`
- [x] RELATIONSHIPS — unchanged
- [x] SPECIALIZED-EDITS — N/A
- [x] METADATA — `created_by` / `creation_date` left untouched (existing term); `term_tracker_item` added
- [x] AUTOMATED-VALIDATION — `make travis_build` passes; all 21 SPARQL QC rules report 0 violations
- [x] REFERENCE-VALIDATION — no new PMIDs introduced
- [x] CHANGES-COMMITTED

- Triggered by: @raymond91125

EOF
)"
